_comment: Managed processes the desktop spawns when JARVIS_DESKTOP_OWNS_AGENT=1 (Phase 0/1 of the unified-app design). command/cwd are repo-root-relative (resolved by supervisor::maybe_start_managed_stack); args are NOT resolved, so paths in args are relative to the process cwd. The SFU declares a health_addr (port gate); the voice-agent has none — its real health is a smoke turn, proven manually.
